content_body:
Come play history at Georgia Pinball Museum! Boasting classic pinball machines from the 1930s all the way through the 1990s, the $10 admission gives you a full day of pinball fun. 

Great idea for Father's Day fun, birthday celebrations, or even a guy's trip to Blue Ridge, GA!

Located next to Expedition Bigfoot Museum, spend a fun-filled afternoon playing vintage pinball machines and exploring Bigfoot's mysterious museum finds.

Georgia Pinball Museum's sister location is Vertigo Pinball in Downtown Blue Ridge, offering more vintage pinball machines and current games.
title: Georgia Pinball Museum
